3273410.name: Rolimã Fest Adventures
3273410.description:
Imagine in your wildest dreams going down a street inside a roller coaster, a wooden cart, or even a runaway shopping cart. Now turn it into a racing competition to see who gets there first, or at least doesn't get smashed by the first post. That's Rolimã Fest Adventures.

Explore several circuits in this city based on Brazilian postcards (more locations coming soon).

Coming soon is an online mode so you can show your friends how good you are at winning races and skidding your cart and crashing into the curb.

Exclusive game with three competition modes:

- Casual Mode: You can customize the race before starting by changing the weather, collisions, weapons and traps, number of laps and others, a simple race for those who want to have fun without losing friends.

- Championship Mode: Race through 3 random circuits, whoever wins the most points at the end takes the Golden Wheel Trophy, then you can put it in your gallery to show off to your short-armed friends. - Elimination Mode: Here you race on a circuit where the last placed competitor is eliminated on each lap. A brutal race for survival, anything goes to stay in first place or to push your opponent to last place. Don't make enemies, okay?
3273410.supported_languages:
英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
